item.title: 从亚马逊到爱彼迎，美国蓝筹债券发售量逼近纪录高位
item.description: 中东战事。收益率与油价攀升。私营部门信贷危机。但本周对于企业借款人而言，这些似乎都无关紧要，因为美国投资级债券的发行规模再次逼近历史新高。【原文：Middle East war. Rising yields and oil prices. Private credit distress. It barely seemed to matter for corporate borrowers this week as US investment-grade bond sales came close to yet another record.】

item.title: 1月份美国职位空缺普遍增加，裁员人数减少
item.description: 1月份美国职位空缺增加，裁员人数减少，这表明在劳动力市场出现新的疲软迹象之前，对劳动力的需求正在好转。【原文：US job openings rose in January and layoffs fell, signaling that demand for workers was improving before the labor market showed fresh signs of weakness.】

item.title: Peloton的新一轮复苏计划寄希望于GLP-1用户和更多跑步机
item.description: 去年，Peloton Interactive Inc. 正为迎接人工智能时代，着手对其设备和软件进行全面升级。该计划包含一系列酷炫的新产品和功能，旨在帮助公司吸引新客户，同时留住现有忠实用户。【原文：Last year, Peloton Interactive Inc. was preparing a sweeping overhaul of its equipment and software for the AI era. The plan was a suite of cool new products and features that would help it capture new customers while locking in the already faithful.】

item.title: 随着对伊朗战争的担忧日益加剧，美国消费者信心指数下滑
item.description: 由于近几周市场对伊朗战争可能影响汽油价格的担忧加剧，美国消费者信心指数已跌至三个月来的最低点。【原文：US consumer sentiment declined to a three-month low as fears mounted in recent weeks about the impact on gasoline prices from the war with Iran.】

item.title: Hims股价有望创下历史新高，新签署的Novo协议提振市场信心
item.description: 随着与诺和诺德公司（Novo Nordisk A/S）达成新的合作，市场对该公司在减肥药领域的未来前景重燃乐观情绪，Hims & Hers Health Inc.的股价有望创下有史以来最佳单周表现。【原文：Hims & Hers Health Inc. shares are on pace for their best week on record as a new partnership with Novo Nordisk A/S fuels fresh optimism about the company’s future in weight-loss drugs.】

item.title: 法官阻止MFS首席执行官提名的人选接管这家破产贷款机构的分支机构
item.description: 伦敦一家法院驳回了已倒闭的房地产贷款机构Market Financial Solutions Ltd.首席执行官提出的请求，该请求旨在让其指定的官员负责监督该集团旗下某实体的破产清算工作。【原文：A London court blocked a bid by the chief executive officer of collapsed property lender Market Financial Solutions Ltd. to have his preferred officials oversee the insolvency of one of the group’s entities.】

item.title: 美国股市上涨，因疲软的经济数据提振了降息预期
item.description: 周五开盘时，美国股市上涨，因为经济疲软的迹象提振了市场对美联储降息的预期。交易员们还密切关注着中东战争的最新动态。【原文：US stocks rose at the opening bell on Friday as signs of a sluggish economy boosted hopes for an interest-rate cut from the Federal Reserve. Traders also pored over the latest headlines from the Middle East war.】

item.title: 贝莱德旗下2200亿美元的模型系统仍看好股市
item.description: 在全球地缘政治紧张局势导致各类资产市场动荡之际，这家全球最大的资产管理公司仍坚持其对美国股市的乐观展望，这一观点贯穿其规模达2200亿美元的模型平台。【原文：The world’s largest asset manager is standing by its bullish outlook for US equities across its $220 billion model platform as geopolitical tension roils asset classes.】

item.title: 南非矿产勘探活动连续第七年下滑
item.description: 尽管政府致力于扭转这一颓势，但南非在矿产勘探方面的投资已连续第七年下滑。【原文：South Africa’s investment in mineral exploration dropped for a seventh consecutive year, despite the government’s ambitions to arrest the decline.】

item.title: 原糖价格有望录得周涨幅，市场关注巴西燃料政策
item.description: 受原油价格上涨提振，原糖价格有望连续第四周上涨。交易员正密切关注全球最大产糖国巴西是否会上调国内汽油价格，因为此举可能导致更多甘蔗被转用于生物燃料生产。【原文：Raw sugar headed for a fourth weekly gain, buoyed by a rally in crude oil, with traders watching to see if top grower Brazil will boost domestic gasoline prices, which could result in more sugar cane diverted to biofuel production.】

item.title: 力拓将放缓魁北克锂厂建设进度，因成本激增
item.description: 力拓集团宣布获得该项目控股权仅数周后，便决定放缓位于魁北克省贝坎库尔的Nemaska锂加工厂的建设进度。【原文：Rio Tinto Group will slow down construction of the Nemaska Lithium processing plant in Becancour, Quebec, just few weeks after it announced it has taken majority control of the project.】

item.title: 加纳拖欠贷款威胁到可可豆采购
item.description: 加纳可可监管机构尚未偿还过去两年从贸易商处借入的逾4亿美元贷款，这增加了其下个季度可能无力购入可可豆的风险——这一挫折或将导致全球供应紧张。【原文：Ghana’s cocoa regulator hasn’t repaid more than $400 million in loans taken from traders over the past two years, raising the risk that it won’t have enough cash to buy beans next season — a setback that could squeeze global supplies.】

item.title: 调查显示，在伊朗与沙特冲突爆发前，欧佩克石油产量有所上升
item.description: 彭博社的一项调查显示，随着地区紧张局势加剧，作为该组织领导者的沙特阿拉伯加大了产量，导致欧佩克上个月的原油产量有所上升。【原文：OPEC’s crude oil production climbed last month as group leader Saudi Arabia bolstered production amid rising regional tensions, a Bloomberg survey showed.】

item.title: 嘉信理财预计第一季度营收增长16%
item.description: 查尔斯·施瓦布公司预计第一季度营收将增长约16%，尽管经济走向和中东局势尚不明朗，但散户投资者仍保持活跃。【原文：Charles Schwab Corp. expects revenue growth of around 16% for the first quarter as retail investors remain engaged despite uncertainty about the direction of the economy and the war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 瑞银资产管理计划增持欧洲短期债券，因市场对加息的预期被视为过度
item.description: 瑞银资产管理认为，市场在为英国央行和欧洲央行的加息做准备方面已过度超前。【原文：UBS Asset Management is betting the market has gotten too far ahead of itself positioning for interest-rate hikes by the Bank of England and the European Central Bank.】

item.title: 随着伊朗局势升级，印度储备银行出手支撑卢比，该国外汇储备出现下滑
item.description: 印度外汇储备降幅创2024年11月以来最大，分析师称，在伊朗战争引发市场动荡之际，央行采取了干预措施以支撑卢比汇率。【原文：India’s foreign exchange reserves fell by the most since November 2024 as analysts said the central bank intervened to support the rupee amid volatility from the Iran War.】

item.title: 摩根大通称，散户投资者首次显现出买方疲劳迹象
item.description: 随着中东局势升级及通胀担忧抑制了该群体的风险偏好，美国散户投资者正逐渐收敛其通常对股市的强烈支持。【原文：US retail investors are taking a step back from their typically strong support for stocks, as the escalation in the Middle East and inflation concerns weigh on the group’s risk appetite.】

item.title: 欧洲航空公司因对燃油成本进行部分对冲而面临风险
item.description: 飙升的航空燃油价格正拖累航空股表现，并威胁着企业盈利——随着中东冲突进入第三周，各家航空公司仅做好了应对短期冲击的准备。【原文：Soaring jet fuel prices are weighing on airline stocks and threatening earnings — with carriers positioned only for short-term disruption as the Middle East conflict grinds into its third week.】

item.title: 从中情局特工到首席执行官：间谍们走出阴影，步入董事会
item.description:
特朗普力推1.5万亿美元国防预算，或将为人工智能及新兴技术带来新机遇【原文：

Trump’s push for $1.5 trillion defense budget could open new opportunities for AI, emerging tech

】

item.title: 美国赌客将在“疯狂三月”锦标赛上投注33亿美元
item.description: 美国博彩协会表示，今年美国民众将在NCAA男女篮球锦标赛上合法投注33亿美元。【原文：Americans will legally wager $3.3 billion on the NCAA men’s and women’s basketball tournaments this year, the American Gaming Association said.】

item.title: 美国国债价格上涨，因数据支持美联储今年降息的观点
item.description: 数据显示消费者变得更加谨慎、通胀顽固且经济增长放缓，受此影响，美国国债价格上涨，债券交易员几乎已将美联储一次降息预期计入价格。【原文：US Treasuries advanced and bond traders nearly priced in one Federal Reserve interest-rate cut after data revealed a more discerning consumer, sticky inflation and weaker growth.】

item.title: 总部位于迪拜的Veon表示，将通过数字化转型来抵消能源成本带来的影响
item.description: 总部位于迪拜的电信公司Veon Ltd.预计，中东冲突将推高成本，尽管其不断扩大的服务范围——包括数字服务——应有助于缓解这一影响。【原文：Veon Ltd., a Dubai-based telecommunications company, expects the Middle East conflict to raise costs, even as its expanding range of services — including digital offerings — should help cushion the impact.】

item.title: 赫格塞特称，美国正在调查针对伊朗一所女子学校的袭击事件
item.description: 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，美国中央司令部已指派调查人员对伊朗一所女子小学遭袭事件展开调查，该事件造成约180人死亡。【原文：US Central Command has assigned investigators to look into an attack on a all-girls elementary school in Iran that killed about 180 people, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said.】

item.title: 格里尔表示，在巴黎会谈前，美国寻求中美关系保持稳定
item.description: 美国贸易代表杰米森·格里尔表示，在本周末即将举行的高层会议之前，美国政府正致力于维持与中国的稳定关系，此次会议将为美国总统唐纳德·特朗普与中国国家主席习近平的峰会奠定基础。【原文：US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said the administration is seeking to maintain steady relations with China ahead of a high-level meeting this weekend that will set the stage for a summit between President Donald Trump and Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping.】

item.title: 印度邻国寻求新德里协助缓解燃油短缺
item.description: 随着中东战争导致波斯湾能源供应受阻，印度的邻国正向新德里寻求额外的燃料供应，这为这个亚洲第三大经济体提供了在该地区建立良好声誉的机会。【原文：India’s neighbors are seeking additional fuel from New Delhi as the war in the Middle East curtails access to energy supplies from the Persian Gulf, giving Asia’s third-largest economy an opportunity to build goodwill across the region.】

item.title: 美国GDP增速放缓后，消费者支出仅微幅增长
item.description: 在去年年底经济增长数据被修正为低于此前报告的水平后，1月份美国消费者支出仅微幅增长。【原文：US consumer spending barely rose in January after economic growth was weaker than previously reported at the end of last year.】

item.title: 加拿大减少83,900个就业岗位，失业率升至6.7%
item.description: 上个月，加拿大经济损失的就业岗位数量创下四年多来的最高纪录，导致失业率升至6.7%。【原文：The Canadian economy lost the most jobs in more than four years last month, driving the unemployment rate up to 6.7%.】

item.title: 战争导致供应紧张，印度液化石油气经销商门前人潮涌动
item.description: 燃气经销商维沙尔·维拉斯·曼达雷凝视着浦那自家店外蜿蜒的队伍——在伊朗战争爆发前，这家店每天仅能服务20人。客户们扛着空气瓶，纷纷向他和店员询问关于印度主要烹饪燃料即将短缺的问题。【原文：Gas dealer Vishal Vilas Mandhare stares at the snaking queue outside his shop in Pune, which served just 20 people a day before the Iran war. Carrying empty cylinders, clients pepper him and his staff with questions about the looming shortages of India’s cooking fuel of choice.】

item.title: 沙特股市逆海湾动荡趋势上涨，本地投资者入场
item.description: 随着伊朗战争爆发，海湾地区股市在交易恢复后似乎注定会暴跌。但得益于本地投资者的支撑，沙特股市却逆势上涨，打破了这一预期。【原文：As the Iran war erupted, Gulf stock markets looked certain to tumble once trading resumed. But Saudi equities have defied those expectations to rise despite the conflict, helped by support from local investors.】

item.title: 马斯洛夫斯卡表示，只有当冲击持续存在时，波兰才会考虑加息
item.description: 波兰央行决策者加布里埃拉·马斯洛夫斯卡表示，只有当通胀压力持续的时间超过一两个季度时，波兰才会考虑加息。【原文：Poland may consider interest rate hikes only if price pressures return for a longer period than one or two quarters, according to central bank policymaker Gabriela Maslowska.】
